title: pilosella longa
intro: Pilosella longa, also known as Devil's Claw or False Hawk's Beard, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects, due to the presence of harpagoside and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Pilosella longa include relief from arthritis, muscle and joint pain, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to improve sleep quality and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Pilosella longa can be made into teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are available in health food stores and online, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
